title: phyllagathis dichotoma
intro: Phyllagathis dichotoma, also known as the 'Wild Chrysanthemum', is a shrub-like plant species that belongs to the family Melastomataceae. The plant has been traditionally used in various cultures for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. It has been reported to have health benefits such as reducing fever, treating respiratory issues like bronchitis and asthma, and aiding in the digestion process. In herbal preparations, Phyllagathis dichotoma is often used to make tea, infusions, or decoctions, and it is also used in traditional medicine to make ointments and salves for skin conditions.
